programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo se dirige a Los Ángeles para colaborar con el equipo local en la investigación de un asesinato, que pronto se convierte en algo mucho más grande. Mientras tanto, Tony empieza a investigar la vida privada de Ziva.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En Los Ángeles, Gibbs y McGee siguen colaborando con la división del NCIS para rastrear a un grupo terrorista.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un agente de ICE tras una brecha de seguridad en la casa del Secretario de la Marina, el equipo del NCIS tiene que colaborar con el FBI y el ICE para resolver el caso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de la confrontación entre Tony y Rivkin, el equipo del NCIS viaja a Israel para una confrontación final, pero no son bien recibidos por el padre de Ziva, que es el jefe del Mossad.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando un famoso jugador de baloncesto aparece muerto por una aparente sobredosis, Danny investiga sus posibles vínculos con una banda local de drogas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El caso se vuelve personal para Danny cuando trabaja para proteger a la enfermera Faith Madson (Jessie Mueller) de su violento exnovio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El juicio de Eddie se ve nublado por su pasado cuando arresta a un conocido detestable de la universidad bajo cargos cuestionables.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen a una fuerza de tarea antidrogas para rastrear a un proveedor de drogas. Baez entra en contacto con las sustancias y pronto lucha por su vida debido a una sobredosis accidental.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está buscando a un asesino en serie que deja marcas distintivas en los rostros de las víctimas con la ayuda de un impresionante nuevo miembro potencial del equipo, la sicóloga forense Dra. Tara Lewis.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un bus en Los Ángeles es atacado con gas sarín, la UAC debe actuar con rapidez para encontrar al sospechoso antes de que ocurra un incidente a gran escala.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las futuras novias en Savannah son asesinadas en vísperas de su boda, la UAC sospecha que una mujer rechazada está llevando a cabo los crímenes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando tres empleados de restaurantes mueren en un robo/homicidio en Las Vegas, Nevada, la UAC busca pistas en un caso cerrado que sucedió en la ciudad hace seis años.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Verdad o consecuencias
programme.desc: Mientras comienza la búsqueda del sustituto de Ziva, Gibbs y los miembros restantes de su equipo deben volver al trabajo con el pasado todavía pesando en sus mentes.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Reunión
programme.desc: El equipo descubre que la extraña muerte de un marine y sus dos amigos puede estar relacionada con su pasado, pero es Gibbs quien acaba haciendo un viaje al pasado.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a routine traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers and residents systematically retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. A police department conducts a drug-reversal-buy sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman bites both the arresting officer and a store manager after getting caught stealing beer. The passenger of a suspicious vehicle is caught attempting to hide drugs in the seat. Police respond to a domestic abuse call involving a knife and two women.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a foot pursuit after the passenger of a suspicious vehicle starts running. A man barricades himself in the house after stabbing his nephew. A teenager is caught ditching school to smoke marijuana.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them. Both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence. A 12-year friendship is jeopardized when a woman suspects her roommate of stealing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shoplifter flees on foot after stealing kids' shoes, an erratic driver has a concealed firearm (and something less concealed), and a man on probation gets his car searched.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Una chica en apuros
programme.desc: Las risas no paran cuando Viola, disfrazada de su hermano gemelo, Sebastian, se une al equipo de fútbol masculino de la escuela secundaria y los ayuda a ganar el gran partido mientras se enamora inesperadamente de Duke, el guapo delantero estrella.

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: Vaselina 2
programme.desc: Muchos de los personajes de la exitosa "Grease" regresan al campus, y los nuevos son igualmente memorables, en este tributo a las faldas tubo, la seducción y el amor entre jóvenes.

programme.title: Amor sin escalas
programme.desc: Ryan (ganador del Oscar, George Clooney) vuela a todos lados por trabajo, pero luego de conocer a una pasajera se da cuenta de que la vida no se trata del viaje, sino de las conexiones que se hagan en el camino.

programme.title: Vaselina
programme.desc: ¡Vaselina es lo que quieres! Vuelve a la preparatoria con Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), el líder de la banda de chicos malos T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), y un reparto para rocanrolear.

programme.title: Forrest Gump (ESP)
programme.desc: La historia de Forrest Gump, interpretado por Tom Hanks, un hombre de Alabama que se ve envuelto en momentos clave de la historia de EE. UU. mientras busca a su gran amor; una película ganadora de 6 premios Óscar.

programme.title: Los hermanos del hierro
programme.desc: Reynaldo y Martín Del Hierro son testigos del asesinato de su padre por parte de Pascual Velazco. Mientras crecen, son envenenados por el deseo de venganza de su madre, pero una vez que lo consiguen cambiará sus vidas para siempre.

programme.title: La joven mancornadora
programme.desc: Lola se disfraza de hombre para matar a los hermanos Salazar, pero al ver que no es tan sencillo, se convierte en su caporal y trata de enamorarlos para vengarse de ellos.

programme.title: Aquí Está Tu Enamorado
programme.desc: Antonio es un apuesto "Don Juan" al que le encantan las mujeres, pero huye del matrimonio como del diablo. Todo se complicará cuando pretende a la novia del comisiario y la llegada de un "paquete" misterioso.

programme.title: Alazán y enamorado
programme.desc: Un ranchero con temple debe lidiar con que su caballo se ha enamorado de Lady Godiva, la yegua de su vecina, una mujer fuerte y decidida. Mientras buscan una solución para el romance de sus caballos, entre ellos también surgirá el amor.

programme.title: Los hermanos del hierro
programme.desc: Reynaldo y Martín Del Hierro son testigos del asesinato de su padre por parte de Pascual Velazco. Mientras crecen, son envenenados por el deseo de venganza de su madre, pero una vez que lo consiguen cambiará sus vidas para siempre.

programme.title: La noche del halcón
programme.desc: En una acogedora y espléndida escenografía del campo mexicano, un rudo pistolero retirado tiene problemas con su ahijado cuando este se enamora de la misma mujer que él ama.

programme.title: Chabelo y Pepito detectives
programme.desc: Un comandante amigo de Chabelo y Pepito les pide que lo ayuden a descubrir una banda que rapta niños. Ellos aceptan y se infiltran en la banda para descubrir que los villanos son seres de otro planeta

programme.title: Chabelo y Pepito en la lámpara maravillosa
programme.desc: Pepito descubre que el objeto que compró es una lámpara maravillosa, y pide toda clase de deseos. Pero ahora que su padrastro lo sabe y la quiere ocupar para hacer el mal, debe evitar que lo consiga.

programme.title: El embajador del miedo
programme.desc: Mientras toda la nación ve avanzar la campaña presidencial hacia las elecciones, un soldado corre contra el tiempo para descubrir una conspiración detrás de ella, una conspiración que podría destruir a la democracia misma.

programme.title: El apostador
programme.desc: Jim Bennett (Mark Wahlberg) es un profesor con una doble vida, adicto a las apuestas de mucho dinero. Al tomar dinero prestado de unos gánsteres muy peligrosos, pone en peligro la vida de sus seres queridos y debe jugarse a todo o nada.

programme.title: Bajo anestesia
programme.desc: Mientras se somete a una cirugía, un joven adinerado experimenta una conciencia intraoperatoria y descubre que el equipo quirúrgico tenía la intención de asesinarlo.

programme.title: Narc: Calles peligrosas
programme.desc: Jason Patric es Nick Tellis, un oficial de narcóticos suspendido que debe investigar el asesinato de Michael Calvess, un policía novato que murió por circunstancias dudosas.

programme.title: Asesino a Sueldo
programme.desc: Slevin (Josh Hartnett) se marcha de Los Ángeles, por un error de identidad cae en medio de una guerra entre los dos jefes criminales más temidos de la ciudad: El rabino (Ben Kingsley) y el jefe (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Zodiaco
programme.desc: La película está basada en los libros de Robert Graysmith sobre la vida real del famoso Zodiaco, un asesino serial que aterrorizó a San Francisco mediante aparentes homicidios aleatorios durante las décadas del 60 y 70.

programme.title: Confessions Of A Dangerous Mind
programme.desc: Mientras el inconformista creador de los programas de juegos favoritos de EE. UU. gana notoriedad por sus éxitos, se ve atraído al mundo de las operaciones encubiertas del gobierno. George Clooney dirige esta historia más extraña que la ficción.

programme.title: Aventura en Alaska
programme.desc: Tras graduarse de la Universidad Emory en 1992, el estudiante estrella y atleta Christopher McCandless abandonó sus posesiones, entregó sus ahorros de $24.000 a la caridad y se fue a dedo hasta Alaska a vivir en la naturaleza.

programme.title: Seabiscuit
programme.desc: Una auténtica historia del mundo de las carreras en el momento de la depresión, cuyas victorias animaron no solo a los espíritus del equipo que los apoyaba, sino también a toda una nación.

programme.title: Desafío
programme.desc: Desafío es una fascinante aventura sobre la extraordinaria historia verdadera de los hermanos Bielski, simples agricultores -independientes y desarmados- que convirtieron a un grupo de refugiados de guerra en poderosos luchadores por la libertad.

programme.title: Una Jaula de Grillos
programme.desc: Robin Williams encarna a Armand, el propietario de una excéntrica discoteca de Miami que, junto a su socio (Nathan Lane), quiere convencer a la futura familia política de su hijo de que son tan puritanos como ellos. Coprotagonizada por Gene Hackman.

programme.title: Misión imposible 4: Protocolo fantasma
programme.desc: El FMI se cierra cuando participa en el bombardeo del Kremlin, lo que provoca que Ethan Hunt y su nuevo equipo se conviertan en rebeldes para limpiar el nombre de su organización.

programme.title: Misión imposible 5: Nación secreta
programme.desc: Ethan y su equipo se embarcan en su misión más imposible hasta ahora, erradicando el Sindicato, una organización internacional ilegal tan altamente capacitada como ellos, comprometida con la destrucción del FMI.

programme.title: El gran rescate
programme.desc: En medio de la Segunda Guerra Mundial, el Batallón nro. 6 de exploradores recibe una misión de proporciones heroicas: ir 50 kilómetros tras las líneas enemigas y liberar a más de 500 prisioneros de guerra estadounidenses.

programme.title: Acción policial
programme.desc: La leyenda de las artes marciales Jackie Chan presenta la quinta entrega de la franquicia “Acción policial”, incluyendo a Tian Jing (SPECIAL ID) y Rongguang Yu (THE KARATE KID) en una historia de vínculos familiares, traiciones y venganza.

programme.title: Tirador
programme.desc: Decidido a probar su inocencia en una traición, Bob Lee Swagger se encuentra ahora en una tensa carrera contra todas las fuerzas de la ley de los Estados Unidos y contra una organización oscura que quiere verlo muerto.

programme.title: Misión imposible 5: Nación secreta
programme.desc: Ethan y su equipo se embarcan en su misión más imposible hasta ahora, erradicando el Sindicato, una organización internacional ilegal tan altamente capacitada como ellos, comprometida con la destrucción del FMI.

programme.title: Los Hermanos Grimm
programme.desc: En esta película visionaria, Will y Jake Grimm sorprenden a los pueblos con sus folclores creativos e ilusiones elaboradas, pero descubren que los personajes fantásticos y las situaciones emocionantes en sus amadas historias son reales.

programme.title: La familia Addams
programme.desc: Ven y únete a La Familia Addams ¡para el festival del terror más hilarante de la temporada o de cualquier otra

programme.title: Los locos Addams II
programme.desc: El futuro de la familia se torna incierto cuando la malvada niñera se casa con Lucas mientras los niños están embarcados en un campamento de verano. Pero Merlina tiene aún una o dos cartas bajo la manga…

programme.title: Los Hermanos Grimm
programme.desc: En esta película visionaria, Will y Jake Grimm sorprenden a los pueblos con sus folclores creativos e ilusiones elaboradas, pero descubren que los personajes fantásticos y las situaciones emocionantes en sus amadas historias son reales.

programme.title: Mini espías
programme.desc: Los superespías Gregorio (Antonio Banderas) e Ingrid (Carla Gugino) dejan una vida de intrigas para criar a sus hijos. Después de que un siniestro supervillano secuestre a los padres, los niños tendrán que salir al rescate.

programme.title: La familia Addams
programme.desc: Ven y únete a La Familia Addams ¡para el festival del terror más hilarante de la temporada o de cualquier otra

programme.title: Los locos Addams II
programme.desc: El futuro de la familia se torna incierto cuando la malvada niñera se casa con Lucas mientras los niños están embarcados en un campamento de verano. Pero Merlina tiene aún una o dos cartas bajo la manga…

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood II
programme.desc: Axel Foley regresa a Beverly Hills para ayudar a Taggart y Rosewood a investigar el tiroteo casi mortal del jefe Bogomil y la serie de "crímenes del alfabeto" asociados a él. Protagonizada por Eddie Murphy.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood III
programme.desc: Axel Foley (Eddie Murphy), que investiga una red de robo de coches, se encuentra con algo mucho más grande que eso: los mismos hombres que mataron a su jefe llevan una red de blanqueo de dinero en un parque temático de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Happy, Texas
programme.desc: Dos convictos fugitivos son confundidos con dos asesores de un concurso de belleza local en la ciudad de Happy, Texas y se hacen pasar por la pareja que organiza el concurso. ¡Los dos se enfrentan rápidamente a consecuencias impredecibles!

programme.title: Un elefante llamado Vera
programme.desc: Bill Murray y Janeane Garafalo protagonizan está loca comedia sobre un hombre al que la vida le cambia para siempre cuando hereda un elefante de circo.

programme.title: Querido Dios
programme.desc: Greg Kinnear protagoniza en este espíritu-levantador sobre un estafador que va de nada bueno al hacer el bien.

programme.title: El señor mamá
programme.desc: Michael Keaton y Terri Garr protagonizan este clásico en el que interpretan a una pareja que ve alterada su vida cuando Garr se pone a trabajar y Keaton se convierte en quién tiene que lidiar con los niños ¡Y con una lavadora que también se queja!

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el piloto?
programme.desc: Considerada "una de las 10 películas más divertidas de la historia" por el American Film Institute, "¿Y dónde está el piloto?" es una obra maestra de la comedia de disparate.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: Bala mordida
programme.desc: Mauro Hernández es un joven policía que bajo las órdenes de su comandante se ve involucrado en un intercambio de droga.

programme.title: Amor letra por letra
programme.desc: Una historia de amor accidental, dinero y recuerdos familiares cargada de comedia y risas. Una comedia romántica que derrocha amor y alegría.

programme.title: El lugar donde estuvo el paraíso
programme.desc: En Iquitos, el cónsul de un país sin nombre debe enfrentarse a una doble persecución. Por un lado, la de las autoridades locales en busca de un refugiado político y, por otro, la de los celos incontrolables de su hija Anna.

programme.title: Cara o sello
programme.desc: Carlos Mendoza es un policía honesto. Cuando no acepta un soborno y encarcela a los culpables, despierta la ira de un narcotraficante local, que secuestra a su familia y lo hace elegir entre su familia, su carrera y su compañero.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer 2: Texas sangriento
programme.desc: Cuando una pandilla de ladrones de bancos escapa hacia la frontera, terminan en el bar equivocado y se meten con los vampiros equivocados. ¡Será una batalla de matar o morir para frenar a estas criaturas malignas y sobrevivir!

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: Cazador de demonios
programme.desc: Un maldito pistolero (Wesley Snipes) cuyas víctimas regresan de entre los muertos, recluta a un joven guerrero para ayudar en la lucha contra una banda de zombies.

programme.title: Terror en Amityville
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1974, una familia de seis miembros fue víctima de un brutal asesinato. Un año después, una pareja joven e inocente, George y Kathy Lutz, y sus hijos se mudan a una casa en la que ocurrió un terrible incidente.

programme.title: 666: El niño Diablo
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita desde el cielo hasta la Tierra. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adopte pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: Event Horizon: La nave de la muerte
programme.desc: En 2047, un equipo de astronautas se embarca en una misión para recuperar una nave espacial. Sin embargo, esta simple tarea los conducirá a algo mucho más aterrador de lo que imaginaban.

programme.title: La isla siniestra
programme.desc: En 1954, el alguacil Teddy Daniels investiga la desaparición de un asesino que escapó de un hospital de alta seguridad para enfermos mentales.

programme.title: Johnny Guitar
programme.desc: Gambling house operator Vienna seeks control of a town as archrival Emma Small sets out to force Vienna out of town. The timely arrival of Johnny Guitar thwarts Emma's dark plans, but doesn't prevent a showdown between the women.

programme.title: Run For Cover
programme.desc: Ex-criminal in the old days of the West teaches a woman the ways of love and a boy the art of courage.

programme.title: The Iron Sheriff
programme.desc: Sterling Hayden plays a sheriff with continuing moral dilemmas. Should he relate a deathbed confession which falsely implicates his son in a murder? Should he carry out his threat to cold-bloodedly kill the real murderer or bring him to legal justice?

programme.title: The Fighting Kentuckian
programme.desc: Leading a regiment of Kentucky riflemen during the War of 1812, John Wayne is the frontiersman who battles to save his love and his homeland from speculators, after the Battle of New Orleans.

programme.title: The Strawberry Roan
programme.desc: Gene’s first color film stars Champion in the title role as a wild outlaw stallion, branded a killer, and the two-fisted cowboy who fights off a gun-crazed posse to win justice for the noble animal.

programme.title: Loaded Pistols
programme.desc: Seeking a man who has killed his best friend in a poker game, Gene Autry finds a cowboy hiding from a posse. The young man's gun is the murder weapon yet Gene is convinced of his innocence.

programme.title: Sam Whiskey
programme.desc: Welcome to America's Wild - and very wacky - West! Burt Reynolds, Clint Walker, Ossie Davis and Angie Dickinson star in this tongue-in-cheek tale of love, lust and larceny as an amiable con-artist is hire by a sexy widow to break into the U.S. Mint.

programme.title: Fort Yuma
programme.desc: When a revered Apache chief is brutally murdered en route to Fort Yuma to negotiate a peace treaty, all-out war erupts in this rousing -- and surprisingly touching -- western starring Peter Graves and directed by the legendary Lesley Selander.

programme.title: The Greatest Story Ever Told
programme.desc: Max Von Sydow, John Wayne, Charlton Heston, Sidney Poitier, and Shelley Winters head an all-star cast in this lavish portrayal of the life of Jesus from legendary director George Stevens. This stunning epic truly is The Greatest Story Ever Told.

programme.title: Solomon and Sheba (1959)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner as the wise leader and singer of songs, Solomon, who finds his world turned upside down with the appearance of the wily temptress Sheba (Gina Lollobrigida). George Sanders, Marisa Pavan, David Farrar, and Harry Andrews co-star.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: Screen greats Burt Lancaster, Paul Scofield and Jeanne Moreau star in this suspense-laden tale of justice and retribution as a French Resistance fighter (Lancaster) attempts to stop a Nazi commander from looting the art treasures of Paris.

programme.title: No Way To Treat A Lady
programme.desc: A crafty serial killer plays a game of cat-and-mouse with a harried police detective trying to track him down.

programme.title: We're No Angels
programme.desc: Humphrey Bogart plays one of his rare comedy roles in this jaunty excursion about three convicts - Joseph (Bogart), Albert (Aldo Ray) and Jules (Peter Ustinov) - who are plotting their escape from Devil's Island.

programme.title: Hollywood Or Bust
programme.desc: A movie-mad nitwit driving across the country to his mecca, Hollywood, is joined by a gambler who wants to break into singing when they pick up a pretty girl en route. Once in Hollywood the nitwit meets his dream goddess.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The Douglases are offered a free paint job on their house and barn so long as they allow the paint company free advertising on their barn wall. Meanwhile, Lisa tries to make spaghetti for Oliver's upcoming birthday. Will it prove im-pasta-ble?

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: While staying with the Douglases, Arnold the Pig witnesses a bank robbery when he goes with the Douglases on an errand in Pixley. When Lisa asks him to describe the two robbers, Arnold, reliving the moment, loses his voice from fear.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver refuses to take Lisa to the annual Carpenter's Ball because he thinks the attendees are too eccentric for his liking. But Lisa has her own motives to attend. She is trying to get a romance sparked between two local singles.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Aloha! The Douglases vacation in Hawaii. But the daughter of the hotel manager needs to keep secret that she double booked the honeymoon suite. The 'sweet' surprise? While Lisa and Oliver settle in, they are unaware that the other room is occupied.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's heirloom watch is broken so he tries to find his ex-secretary Carol's address to ask her the name of the jeweler who fixed it last time. Carol is now working and living in Los Angeles, and we get a glimpse into her new life.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Oliver decides to attend night school and enrolls in a farming class, Lisa does the same, taking psychology. Before long, many of the residents of Hooterville are lining up for appointments with the eminent Dr. Lisa.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: In this classic series' premiere episode, New York City attorney Oliver Wendell Douglas (Eddie Albert) satisfies his desire for the simple life by buying a farm, much to the chagrin of his wife, Lisa (Eva Gabor). John Charles Daly narrates the tale!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) brings his wife, Lisa (Eva Gabor), to their new home, a ramshackle farm near Hooterville, just outside of Pixley, where she gets to meet the town's oddball residents. Bea Benaderet, Edgar Buchanan and Frank Cady guest star!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) is ready to get farming, but Lisa (Eva Gabor) puts her foot down and says she will leave unless they can hire a decorator to fix the house! Meanwhile, Kate Bradley (Bea Benaderet) teaches Lisa how to make hotcakes.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie gets a rude shock when the tall,classy dame whose life he saved in a taxicab turns out to be a man.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The day has come that Mike and Gloria are moving into their new home and Archie is practically pushing them out the door. Archie is being so obnoxious that Mike finally reaches a boiling point until he declares his independence and calls Archie a fathead.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie will do anything to get a promotion at the loading dock. So, he agrees to help Mr. Sanders with his latest charity, unaware that it involves something that goes against his morals - organ donation.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While driving Munson's cab, Archie saves the life of a beautiful woman who becomes unconscious. Uh, was that a woman? Sorry, that was no woman, thanks to female impersonator Beverly LaSalle's convincing act.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Florida's husband, Henry, gets a promotion which means Florida can quit her job as a housekeeper for the Findlays and be a full-time wife for her own family, but she doesn't know how to break the news to Maude.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter's tax return is being audited and he's worried. Maude is unable to pinpoint her past association with the tax man -- until she sees the tattoo on his arm and remembers him as the sailor who had tried to attack her 31 years ago.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Arthur and his new bride, Vivian, return from their honeymoon to a hostile Maude and Walter. Walter has just lost a bundle on a bad investment tip given him by Arthur.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Carol is having discipline problems with her son and hesitates to take a short vacation, but Maude assures Carol that all Phillip needs is a little grandmotherly love and affection.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Francie Potter, the teenager from the ghetto who made a temporary shambles of the Findlay household as Maude's houseguest, is back again -- and this time she wants money.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude tangles with a psychiatrist who is treating her daughter. When Maude learns that Carol is being psychoanalyzed, she feels this is a direct attack on her image as a model mother.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: After Felix induces Oscar to appear on the popular talk show Steinberg is guest-hosting, his roommate gives a riotous account of Felix's prissiness. Felix is incensed, and when Steinberg invites him to make a rebuttal, he leaps at the opportunity.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Blanche tells Oscar she is remarrying and invites him and Felix to the wedding.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix talks Oscar into being a big brother to Mike, a young boy in a reform school.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar hires Felix to cover an international wrestling match and is thrown for a fall by subsequent developments.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When an embezzler, Jimmy Ray, returns to Sparta after many years away, it stirs up old resentments as he encounters the families that he stole from years ago, including Virgil Tibbs’ sweet-natured Aunt Etta, who turns to Chief Gillespie for help.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A rich landowner, Horace Sloan, is visited by Candace Sloan, a distant cousin who claims her grandfather was cheated out of a portion of the Sloan family estate. Horace’s readiness to give Candace her legacy, puts him at odds with his son, Lamar.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: An impending trial will force Gillespie’s daughter Lana Farren to face her attackers, Carl DeLissa and Jack Smet. Meanwhile, mobster attorney Alvin Epp and his corrupt clients are determined to acquire her property for a large land development.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: In this follow-up to 'Even Nice People,' Gillespie’s daughter, Lana Farran, continues to defend her home from her mother’s greedy ex-boyfriend Carl DeLissa and the mob who are willing to go to great lengths to acquire and develop it, even murder.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A skeleton discovered on Alcatraz is that of a convict who supposedly escaped in the 1950s.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After Steve is injured in a fray with a gangster, Mike is demoted to walking a beat for insubordinately insisting on taking revenge.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A policewoman's son holds up taxicabs for a hobby that eventually results in the murder of an undercover cop.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A psychiatrist with an interest in exploiting his patient's criminal past complicates a rape-murder investigation.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: The twelve-year-old daughter of a murdered mother goes after the killer.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A hobo known as Boston comes to see Joe Mannix, explaining that someone has recently tried to kill him, and asking Mannix to find out who it is and why.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: William Avery is released after serving a prison sentence for embezzlement, but almost immediately dies in a car accident. Someone nevertheless begins to stalk his daughter, apparently believing that she knows where the missing money is hidden.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix is invited to the home of Arthur Danford by an old friend, Barney Edmonds, who is managing Danford's campaign for governor of Hawaii.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix tries to help a woman suspected of murder when she kills an intruder in self-defense, who may have been blackmailing her.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A race car driver gets caught cheating on his wife by his brother-in-law, and in order to keep his indiscretions secret he resorts to murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A skater stages an attack on herself to win endorsements, then ices her accomplice---and frames her rival for the killing.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Soft music, candles, and a lifeless body dressed in lovely lingerie. These are the trademarks of 'The Casanova Killer,' a serial murderer who leaves only a stain of blood near the heart, and the sole of a foot marred by an 'X,' as forensic evidence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Soft music, candles, and a lifeless body dressed in lovely lingerie. These are the trademarks of 'The Casanova Killer,' a serial murderer who leaves only a stain of blood near the heart, and the sole of a foot marred by an 'X,' as forensic evidence.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Ben Horne's brother, Jerry, arrives in Twin Peaks; James and Donna decide to be together. Ben and Jerry travel to One Eyed Jacks and meet with it's madam, Blackie O'Reilly. Audrey leaves a clue for Cooper.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: The next morning, Cooper meets with Audrey, who confesses to leaving him the note about One Eyed Jacks. Cooper tells Truman he can't remember who the killer was in his dream, but insists the dream is a code to solving the crime.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Cooper questions Dr. Jacoby, who suspects Leo Johnson is the killer. Cooper's supervisor, Gordon Cole, calls in with Albert's report. Josie Packard spies on Ben Horne and Catherine Martell. Hawk tracks down the One Armed Man.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's investigation of a killing in Chinatown leads them to a Chinese gang leader being pursued by a police officer with a personal interest in the case.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall go undercover at an exclusive resort to find a blackmailer's killer.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: When a millionaire is nearly killed, his wife is the primary heir and prime suspect until she's murdered, prompting Hunter to go undercover to find the real killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and Steve investigate a private eye's murder in the not-very-pretty world of modeling.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A cardiologist and two business partners plot a deadly insurance scam.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A terrorist bombing ignites an undercover investigation involving an ambitious cop.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Men dressed as clowns are robbing banks at gunpoint. During one heist, an ex-partner of Walker's is killed. Walker and Trivette are determined to find the ruthless group. Walker helps the dead ranger's children cope with their loss.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Men dressed as clowns are robbing banks at gunpoint. During one heist, an ex-partner of Walker's is killed. Walker and Trivette are determined to find the ruthless group. Walker helps the dead ranger's children cope with their loss.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama emerges as a contender in an arm-wrestling competition and goes up against a biker's equally tough mother.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi's best friend Luann has just been divorced and Naomi wants to set her up with a friend of hers for a double date with her and Vint. When Luann's date cancels, Naomi suggests Bubba stand in, much to Mama's chagrin.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint announces he's been invited to join The Mystical Order of the Cobra, a local Men's club. Mama, not wanting Vint to make it in, sabotages him, leaving it up to her to save him from humiliation during the ceremony.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint announces that Naomi is the sole beneficiary of his $20,000 life insuracne policy, much to Mama's dismay. Following the announcment, Vint starts having a number of suspicious accidents.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: When the Bundys start having good luck, Al remembers the Bundy Curse and realizes he is doomed.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Marcy tries to imagine being in the bedroom to improve her ability to speak in front of large audiences, but her fantasies tend to go a little too wild.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Kelly and Bud buy a car to share, but sharing a car leads to fighting, and the Bundy children have to double date.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: While Bud, Kelly, and Peggy spend the night impersonating the Village People at the D'Arcy's Halloween party, the Grim Reaper visits Al.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al tries to help a young man forget the idea of marriage. Meanwhile, Kelly gets stung by bees and becomes crazy.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Women take over the nudie bar and the bowling alley, so Al starts an organization called "NO MA'AM."

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al must brave the department of motor vehicles to renew his driver's license, but discovers that his fate lies in Bud's hands.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: An untimely pimple threatens Kelly's acting career.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Jody and Buff's school teacher is out for a few days, and there is a substitute teacher. Jody develops a crush on her.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Uncle Bill allows Buffy & Jody to have a friend stay over for a few days while the parents are out of town. But then Uncle Bill finds out the friend is actually a dog, and pets are not allowed in the apartment building.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Buffy makes friends with another girl in the apartment building and finds out the girl is very sick and may not live too much longer. Buffy asks Uncle Bill if they can have a Christmas holiday because Eve might not be alive in December.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Buffy's class is practicing to perform in a singing program, but Buffy's voice is terrible. Uncle Bill hires a singing coach to help her.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Both the Wilsons and the Mitchells take a trip when Mr. Wilson is selected to pick up a chimpanzee from the San Diego Zoo.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: When Mr. Wilson's nephew visits him in San Diego and gives him and Dennis a ride in his Navy truck, they inadvertently get brought back to the naval base.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Dennis runs away from home because Henry is thinking of getting a new job that would relocate him and his family.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson hangs out and plays with Dennis and his friends for the day to gather information for a magazine article about the changing behaviors of children.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Grandpa Jim's Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Jim wants to play badminton, but his kids see him as too old for such things.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Bud's Encounter With The Law
programme.desc: Kathy's on a tear, throwing everything she can get her hands on into her new spaceship, a/k/a, the family washing machine.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Thanksgiving Day
programme.desc: When Kathy writes a prize-winning Thanksgiving poem, Jim envisions his Kitten as the next Emily Brontë.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Second Honeymoon
programme.desc: Jim and Margaret could use some time away from the house, so they plan a weekend getaway.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie's guitar playing and singing makes him at hit at the local coffeehouse.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve admires the beautiful and shy owner of a local café.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie starts to develop feelings for Sally, Mike's fiance.

programme.desc: In celebration of the pieces' 300th anniversary, Czech harpsichordist and conductor Václav Luks and the renowned Baroque ensemble Collegium 1704 record all six Brandenburg Concertos on historical instruments in 2021.

programme.desc: Authentic Viennese music and dancing from the historic ballrooms of the Hofburg Palace.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A kidnapper grabs 8-year-old Chad Choice from his home in Texas, then torments his parents with two ransom demands. The case goes cold until the parents receive a chilling package in the mail that contains a letter--and a skull.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A look at the case of James Allen Selby, a serial rapist who eluded police for years while attacking 11 women in five states - Oklahoma, Nevada, California, Arizona, and Colorado.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: The killing of a woman in a VA goes unsolved for a quarter of a century before investigators are finally able to zero in on the likely killer. And, in 1999 detectives test the blood evidence and develop a DNA profile of a shooting death from 1980.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A woman's fall from a cliff in the Grand Canyon leads police to uncover a series of grisly murders, and investigators smoke out a killer when they find crucial DNA evidence on his cigarette butts.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Halloween in a small town is canceled indefinitely when a young girl is kidnapped and killed on her way home from a costume party.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: The suspicious death of 2-year-old Billy Blankenship is solved when police force his babysitter to re-enact the circumstances of his death. Then, a murder case is solved when the dead man's body is accidentally found by divers.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A serial rapist seals his own fate when he sends a taunting letter to police. And when a man is found dead in South Dakota, his head bashed in by a 50-pound rock, investigators go on a 20-year search for the killers.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: College student Brad Perry shows up to work his graveyard shift at the gas station and is never seen alive again.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 25-year-old school teacher Christy Mirack is found murdered in her apartment in 1992, there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Just two years into their marriage, Chuck and Cheryl Hall are torn apart when Chuck finds Cheryl murdered. Though Cheryl's family is certain they know her killer, the law isn't as sure. After several decades, a DNA match erases all doubt.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A fire in January 2007 claims the life of WWII vet Bennie Angelo. A closer look at the crime scene reveals Bennie was dead before the fire, bumping an arson case up to homicide.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 36-year-old computer programmer Lisa Valdez fails to show up for work, her apartment manager finds her brutally murdered. Detectives ask, could she be the victim of a brutal serial killer? Or was Lisa murdered by someone she knew?

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A forensic dentist helps police nab a child killer by showing that the teeth marks on the killer's arms match the teeth of the murdered boy. And telltale blood stains on a blue bandana solve the 10-year-old case of a teenage girl murdered.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: DNA found on a marijuana joint in Florida in 2005 helps to solve the 1988 rape and murder of a California woman. And a cold case of murder in Illinois heats up when a jailhouse lawyer turns jailhouse snitch.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: When Sharon Marsh's Aunt Flo makes a monthly visit, she brings a mysterious pet fish for Stan.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Dinner with Cartman's family takes a bizarre twist when Uncle Howard shows up after breaking out of prison with the help of his cellmate, Charlie Manson.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman, Stan, Kyle, and Kenny are assigned to write a report with Tweek, the very nervous and highly caffeinated boy who insists gnomes are stealing his underpants.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The boys' discovery of a man encased in ice threatens Stan and Kyle's friendship.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Bessie Coleman is America's first black woman pilot, and the students of the Little Rock Nine integrate a high school following the Brown v. Board of Education decision.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: A student tunnels beneath the Berlin Wall, Edie Windsor topples the Defense of Marriage Act, and John Wojtowicz robs a bank to pay for his wife's gender reassignment surgery.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: John F. Kennedy's doctor administers him meth for his back pain, and Dr. John C. Lilly takes LSD while studying the intelligence of dolphins.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Journalist Maurine Dallas Watkins writes a play about Chicago's infamous Murderesses' Row, and Mata Hari goes from exotic dancer to double agent during World War I.

programme.desc: En 1988, se descubrió el cuerpo de una mujer joven en un río de Ohio. La mayor parte de la evidencia había sido borrada, pero el hijo de 6 años de la víctima, sin saberlo, les dijo a los investigadores todo lo que necesitaban saber.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, cuando un grupo fundamentalista comienza a robar bancos cerca de Spokane, las autoridades saben de inmediato que están tratando con criminales con experiencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El conductor dijo que no podía haber sido él quien atropelló a un peatón y se fugó en la calle Harrisburg. El Jeep Grand Cherokee que él estaba arrendando en ese entonces había sido vendido meses atrás a otro comprador en otro estado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una peluquera joven y atractiva fue agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su propio salón de belleza. La evidencia en la escena del crimen no coincidió con ninguno de los sospechosos y, después de la investigación inicial, el caso se archivó por diez años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba casera estalló en una casa rural, la policía no tenía idea de quién era el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el estreno de la serie Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia, una asistente de vuelo de Connecticut desaparece. La policía sospecha que su esposo es culpable de asesinato, pero ¿pueden comprobarlo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intruso Invisible
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía recibió una llamada de Darlie Routier informándoles de los asesinatos de sus hijos. La policía encontró al asesino tras analizar las salpicaduras de sangre, haciendo perfiles de comportamiento y analizando la llamada al 911 de Darlie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Patrick McRae fue encontrado muerto en su casa de Des Moines y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. El análisis mostró que procedían de dos personas, una de las cuales era mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Shannon Melendi, de 19 años, desapareció mientras estaba en la Universidad de Emory. Su desaparición permaneció un misterio durante diez años, hasta que una nueva prueba científica proporcionó una nueva pista sobre Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un policía retirado es descubierto en su cama, muerto de una sola herida de bala en la cabeza. Su esposa primero dice que el motivo fue un robo; luego le dice a la policía que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de policía muy respetado es asesinada en su propio hogar. El crimen quedó sin resolver por más de una década, hasta que se forma una nueva unidad de casos sin resolver, que le dan un nuevo vistazo a la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sin oraciones
programme.desc: La fundadora de American Atheists desapareció en 1995 junto con uno de sus hijos y su nieta, junto con 500,000 dólares en monedas de oro. La policía se centró en varios sospechosos, incluyendo a David R. Waters, que trabajaba para los Ateos Americanos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la década de los 90, los medios llamaron a Richard Rogers el "asesino de la última llamada" porque atacaba a hombres en bares gay que obviamente estaban intoxicados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pareja perfecta
programme.desc: Una examinación de la primera vez que se utilizó ADN animal para resolver un caso penal

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Rebecca Barney y su futuro exmarido Fred fueron hallados muertos a tiros en su casa de Tulsa, Oklahoma, la cual había sido incendiada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, la policía de San Diego está desconcertada por un par de manos encontradas en un contenedor de basura. A través de una investigación adicional, determinan que las manos son las de la persona desaparecida Don Hardin.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La coartada
programme.desc: En 1991, una chica de secundaria desaparece después de asistir a una fiesta. El principal sospechoso no tenía a un pero dos testigos que le daban coartada para la noche en que desapareció.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, Christina Sanoubane fue asesinada en su departamento de Cedar Rapids después de dejar a su abusivo novio. Hay pistas en la escena: huellas sangrientas y ADN del kit de violación de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1988, cuando un paciente muere inesperadamente en el consultorio del neurólogo de California, Richard Boggs, la policía comienza lo que creen que será una investigación de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 9 años desaparece, la policía y los voluntarios pasan semanas buscándola.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una Bolsa de Evidencia
programme.desc: Se investiga el asesinato de Jessica Knott, de 9 años. Los investigadores usan una bolsa de basura para conectar al sospechoso James Edward Crow, Jr. con el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un bebé es trasladado urgentemente a la sala de emergencias con problemas respiratorios graves. En meses, hay más de 30 casos similares. ¿Pueden los médicos encontrar la causa y la cura?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, de 19 años, fue condenada por apuñalar a su madre, Barbara Mullenix, en el 2006. Supuestamente cargó el cuerpo sangriento de su madre en una caja de cartón antes de tirarla en Newport Bay, en California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se llama a la policía de las Grandes Llanuras por un cadáver, una verificación de antecedentes de la víctima los lleva a una extraña red de vagabundos sin hogar, subastas de ganado y cheques sin fondos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una noche con vientos en Kansas en 1995, un misterioso incendio arrasó con la casa de un doctor prominente. Entre los escombros, los investigadores encontraron evidencia que les dijo cómo comenzó el incendio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: First, the ladies need to have the "classic look" of a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Kelli's hair and make-up transformations are legendary. The ladies are also assessed through a new state of the art fitness test, "Styku".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli media trains the rookie candidates to determine who best represents the DCC at press events. NBC news anchor, Meredith Land tests their on-camera interview skills.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Personality is critical when representing the DCC brand. Kelli takes the women on location to see how they interact during a public appearance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Katy Perry's choreographer, Nick Florez, stops by to offer some performance advice to the ladies. A day that each cheerleader never forgets. The first time they wear the DCC uniform to pose for their cameo photos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad goes on an appearance to support pop music star, Demi Lovato. The ladies learn the entrance to the famed pre-game dance. It's a make or break moment. If a woman can't learn it quickly it might be her last night.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With two suspended vets, the team must re-block their formations for their Hall Of Fame performance. New vets step up as a new point of the triangle is named. The rookie candidates try to get their footing during this never seen before rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 23 veterans travel to Canton, Ohio to perform at Jerry Jones' induction to the Pro Football Hall of Fame. All eyes are watching as the DCC perform for the NFL elite.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp winds down the pressure skyrockets. No one wants to be sent home now. The ladies start to crack under the pressure. Another one is sent home. Will this be the final cut?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli announces the official squad and the women realize the hard-fought dream of becoming a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Full of excitement and nerves, the squad prepares for their very first football game at AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 125 remaining hopefuls must nail a choreographed routine before advancing to the final rounds, and the DCC veterans reveal their plans for the future.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve is going large as he focuses on the biggest animals to have ever walked the earth. In his dino-den, he starts by meeting the Argentinosaurus, an animal so large that even its poo was deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic was home to the most vicious and violent predators the world has ever seen. To survive, herbivores had to fight back. Steve Backshall goes on a mission to track down the deadliest of all dinosaur defenders.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve tries to chomp through a car like a T-rex, wield an axe like an Allosaurus and hitch a ride in Britain's biggest tank to showcase the might of a Spinosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve gets freaky on a mission to find the weirdest dinosaur ever. He kick-starts with a Gigantoraptor, an 8-metre tall giant that laid the biggest eggs in history.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve discovers just what it takes to be a terror from the skies. He straps himself into one of Britain's fastest wind tunnels where he goes head-to-head against Microraptor.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve travels to new depths as he discovers just what it takes to be an aquatic terror. His quest sees him rocket through water in spectacular style, just like an Opthalmosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve's on a mission to find dinosaurs that have something a little special: fearsome killers, with incredible abilities! Get ready for a sensory sensation! His quest sees him race in the dark like a Troodon.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve goes on an undercover mission to unearth the sneakiest dinosaurs that were far deadlier than they first appeared.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is on the hunt for the most deadly animals to have ever walked the earth, dinosaurs. Steve goes on a mission to uncover what was deadlier than the dinosaurs, from monsoons and super-sized sandstorms to ballistic bacteria and gory gas.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall looks back at the most awesome experiments over the series and chooses his highlights.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter: Baby's Back in Town
programme.desc: Dog tries to nab a fugitive, named Wayne, by calling and telling him that he's won a new vacuum cleaner and he should stick around to get it. Dog then sends his daughter, Lyssa, to "deliver" the vacuum cleaner and lure Wayne out of his house.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses. Also, Dog has crossed paths with the brother before. He once tried to stop Dog from arresting one of the most violent fugitives of his career.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: New series focusing on the tumultuous home and professional life of bounty hunter Dwayne "Dog" Chapman, and his partner and wife Beth. In the first episode, Dog and team chase Floyd Chapman (no relation), a heavily tattooed bail jumper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close-knit community.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. And in fact, as Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities. So in addition to tracking down two felons on the lam, Dog has to prepare for a good.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Dog sets off from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland with some of his fugitives. First, a stop at Leland's boxing gym to warm up for their day of hunting with a quick sparring session and some father-and-son time together.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a brother bondsman from Washington State calls Dog for help tracking a runner in search of fun in the sun on the tropical paradise of Kauai, the team gets on the case. Dog's only problem? No leads!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle's operation is unsuccessful and she slips into a coma. Told she will probably never recover, a grieving Blake returns to Denver; Sammy Jo is attacked by an unknown assailant; Dex discovers Joanna is a link to Alexis' controller, Heath.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fearing that his darkest secret will be revealed because of the search for Roger Grimes's murderer, Blake vows to take the rap to put an end to the investigation; Dex and Sable both go after Heath.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo recognizes Gibson as the man Krystle saw in her nightmares, and Blake vows to protect his family secret with his life; Adam discovers Virginia's secret past; Blake entrusts Dex with documents relating to their family's secret.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis hires a mercenary to get her ships back; Adam and Jeff exchange blows after he accuses Adam of being disloyal to Blake; Dex begins to doubt Alexis can ever offer him the kind of love he needs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sable tries to convince Blake she is on his side. Dex is attracted by her loyalty; Sammy Jo's interest in Tanner McBride intensifies; Dex attacks Adam after learning he took advantage of Virginia; Joanna becomes jealous of Sable's interest in Dex.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sable persuades Heath not to kill her. Upset by her close encounter with death, she goes to Dex for comfort; Alexis goes to Paris to keep an eye on Boyd's commando operation to retrieve her oil tankers.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake resumes control of Denver-Carrington and fires Adam; Joanna accepts Adam's offer to work for him and Alexis; Zorelli confesses his love to Fallon, but she remains confused by her feelings toward him.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis gets her revenge on Sable when she tells her tankers have sunk; Alexis is devastated when she discovers Dex slept with Sable; as Sammy Jo becomes increasingly fond of Tanner McBride, she is unaware that he is married.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is emotionally crushed by Dex's affair with Sable; Blake tells Dex and Sable beneath the lake is a Nazi treasure and his father killed Grimes to prevent him from exploiting it; Adam tries to win back Blake's trust so he can spy for Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sable unleashes her lawsuit against Alexis; Dex dives into the hidden vault beneath the lake and finds it empty; Zorelli tracks down the uncle of Dominique Devereaux, learning he knows something about Grimes' murder; Alexis leaves for Switzerland.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake is a suspect in Elsworth Chisolm's apparent murder; Zorelli is put back on the Grimes case; Charles Matthews warns Blake that Zorelli has been asking him questions about Blake's father.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff and Dex meet with Roger Grimes' wife and learn he has a son; Sable is pregnant and unable to tell Dex that he is the father; Adam has a picture of Jeff and Monica retouched to appear incestuous and then submits it to a sleazy tabloid.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Charles Matthews tells Blake a grim secret; Zorelli finds a bug hidden in his apartment; Alexis tells Monica that Jason Colby isn't her father; Alexis learns she has a Fredrick Stahl original and realizes Blake's deep, dark secret.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis threatens to sue Blake for half of the plundered Nazi treasure unless Sable withdraws her lawsuits against Colbyco. Sable agrees; Krystina leads Fallon to the treasure. They are followed by Dennis Grimes.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex gets stuck babysitting for his little sister Jennifer, who is fed up with feeling in the way at his poker game and decides to disappear.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While gearing up to face the television cameras as captain of his high school's team on "Quiz-Em", Alex panics at first when a teammate drops out and then launches a tutoring program a la Eliza Doolittle for his sister Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse gets so wrapped up in work that she neglects her family.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When pretty Carrie Newman and her mother Julia come to visit the Keatons, Carrie's forward behavior sends Alex into a panic.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Alex takes diet pills for a lift during midterms, his dependency level increases daily.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory secretly submits a picture of Elyse and herself to an ad agency for a mother-daughter-modeling contest.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven's assistant at the station is bright, talented, funny, and witty...and in love with him.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Mallory's boyfriend Jeff arrives home from college and wants to go steady, she's elated, but it's soon apparent that he's a little awed by the school and merely grasping at the familiar.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While working as a DJ at the school radio station, Alex strikes up a telephone friendship with caller Lorraine Ferrar.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A cynical Alex finds the spirit of Christmas in a dream.

programme.desc: Alex anxiously awaits a crucial college recommendation from his English teacher.

programme.desc: On his 18th birthday, Alex defies his mother and goes off with some of his buddies to celebrate at an out-of-town nightclub.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is both amazed and furious when a critical admissions interview at Princeton University is shattered by his hysterical sister Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: Mallory turns to Alex for some advice when she begins to fear she'll lose her new boyfriend unless she agrees to his pleas for a more "adult" romance.

programme.desc: In the hospital awaiting a tonsillectomy, Jennifer fears she may never see her family again.

programme.desc: Elyse feels the need to expand her horizons.
